teleport.name: 瞬影 Blink
teleport.description: Short-range teleport in facing direction. 220px / 3s CD.

backstab.name: 背刺 Backstab
backstab.description: Hits dealt within 90° of target's back arc deal 2× damage.

shroud.name: 隐匿 Shroud
shroud.description: Invisible for first 3s after spawn (break on attack).

notes: SVG sprite sheet — 等同 style_homm3_bright/player_scout.png 规格，Developer 用同样 drawImage(img, col*64, row*64, 64, 64, ...) 切帧
配色：黑斗篷 #1a0a22 + 暗紫 #4a1a4a + 银刀 + 金柄 + 红眼 #ff3a1a，面罩遮眼，双刀
row 2 (walk down) 最详细，玩家大多时间看到的角度
row 4 attack 第 3 帧含紫雾残留，强化 'vanished' 刺客感
row 5 death 最后一帧是紫雾消散（刺客死亡化烟）
Developer 接入后可对着 _qa_chars.html 预览，若 SVG 光栅化失败可用 node puppeteer 烘焙成 PNG
